workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Just came out of executive brief with Contoso Ltd. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-04 14:57 EST
Subject: Follow-up: executive brief Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about executive brief. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Angela Doyle <angela.doyle@contosoltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-10 14:47 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Contoso Ltd executive brief

Our team encountered some challenges with executive brief. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Contoso Ltd: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-H trap (Exposes internal language in customer-facing draft); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-H failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-H failure mode (Exposes internal language in customer-facing draft)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct executive brief decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-H -- Exposes internal language in customer-facing draft
